message:
fix: pass --backend dolt --server to all bd init calls (gt-enott)

Three production callsites were calling `bd init` without `--backend dolt`,
causing SQLite databases to be created instead of Dolt:

- install.go: initTownBeads() called `bd init --prefix hq` (town level)
- doctor/rig_check.go: doctor --fix path for missing rig beads
- cmd/rig.go: `gt rig adopt` re-init when database missing

Also fixed rig.go to check for both beads.db AND dolt/ directory before
deciding to re-initialize, preventing unnecessary re-init of Dolt rigs.

Part of epic gt-5gayx (Beads Classic contamination cleanup).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
